title: Dating App Profile
text:
## Dating App Profile

Hi, I am {person}, a {adjective} {job} who loves {verb ending in -ing}, {food}, and weekend trips to {place}.

My ideal date brings a {color} {object}, laughs at {plural noun}, and never asks why my {animal} knows how to {verb}.

I am looking for someone {emotion}, kind, and only mildly {adjective}.

Fun fact: I once {past-tense verb} a {vehicle} using just my {body part} and a {noun} {adverb}.
